FlowCore Guide: Journal Entries 

During Billing confirmation, no charge the appropriate appointments for the user and confirm the billing 

Go to “Reporting” Tab in iLabs 

Diagram

Description automatically generated 

Click “Load Default” on the first screen that pops up 

Graphical user interface, text, application

Description automatically generated 

Alter report settings 

Report Date à Should be for the past month 

Graphical user interface, text, application

Description automatically generated 

Lab Filter à Check lab that has Journal Entry 

Graphical user interface, text, application

Description automatically generated 

Click “Apply Filters” 

Graphical user interface

Description automatically generated with low confidence 

Click Export à Source Data as csv/xls  

 

Calculate Funds 

 

Format sheet as you likeGraphical user interface, application, table, Excel

Description automatically generated 

Values 

Usage = Quantity * Price 

Cancer Center Subsidy = Usage * 0.25 

Adjusted Usage = Usage – Cancer Center Subsidy 

Previous Balance = Amount from last Journal Entry spreadsheet 

Remaining Balance = Previous Funds – Adjusted Usage 

E-mail lab worksheet and inform of current balance
